heading: “State” defined
label: 349 “State” defined
text: The term “State” means the States of the Union, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands.
notes: Amendments1986— amended section generally, expanding definition of “State” to include the Northern Mariana Islands.Pub. L. 99–3961972— inserted reference to Virgin Islands and Guam.Pub. L. 92–318
Effective Date of 1972 AmendmentAmendment by effective after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 92–318section 506(n) of Pub. L. 92–318section 326a of this titleJune 30, 1970
